scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "NGROK,SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run ngrok" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.dev:tunnel: concurrently -n "NGROK,SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run ngrok" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:tunnel-no-reverse"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n "NGROK,SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run ngrok" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:web"
scripts.client:tunnel-no-reverse: cd client && EXPO_NO_METRO_LAZY=1 npx expo start --tunnel --no-dev-client
scripts.android: concurrently -n "NGROK,SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run ngrok" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:android"
scripts.android:build: concurrently -n "NGROK,SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run ngrok" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:adb"
scripts.ios: concurrently -n "NGROK,SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run ngrok" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:ios"
scripts.expo: concurrently -n "NGROK,SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run ngrok" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:tunnel-no-reverse"
scripts.web: concurrently -n "NGROK,SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run ngrok" "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:web"
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules client/node_modules server/node_modules client/.expo server/dist
scripts.clean:install: npm run clean && npm run install:all
scripts.restart: npm run kill:metro && npm run dev:tunnel
